title: hieracium tephrinum
intro: Hieracium tephrinum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family and is native to various parts of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Hieracium tephrinum can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in salads and as a garnish.
